title: Implement Trie (Prefix Tree)
problem_statement: Implement a trie with insert, search, and startsWith methods.

examples.input: insert("apple"), search("apple"), search("app"), startsWith("app"), insert("app"), search("app")
examples.explanation: The trie supports full and prefix searches separately.

constraints: At most 3 * 10^4 calls will be made.
intuition: Use a fixed-size child array for each trie node and mark word endings.

approaches.name: Trie node array implementation
approaches.description: Store characters in a tree of nodes with 26 children and a boolean to mark completed words.
approaches.time: O(m) per operation, where m is word length
approaches.why_not: Using hash-based prefix matching is harder to make efficient for many operations.

interview_qa.q: What is stored at each trie node?
interview_qa.a: Child references for each letter and a flag indicating whether the path forms a complete word.
By checking whether the prefix path exists in the trie.
